common.name: Name
common.invalidData: Invalid data. Please review the fields.

landing.badge: SAFE, automated billing and operations system
landing.heroTitle: Generate your invoices automatically from timesheets
landing.heroDescription: SAFE helps law firms save time, reduce billing errors and execute faster, by transforming timesheets into invoices ready to validate in a single system.
landing.trust1: SAFE, automated billing and operations system
landing.trust2: Designed for firms of 1 to 5 lawyers
landing.trust3: Data security and dedicated space per firm
landing.whySafeTitle: The competitive edge: automatic invoicing from timesheets
landing.whySafeDescription: SAFE doesn't just store your data. It automates the transition from recorded time to an actionable invoice, for a faster, more reliable and more profitable firm.
landing.feature1Description: SAFE automates repetitive steps between timesheets, preparation and invoice issuance.
landing.feature2Description: Amounts, billed hours and billing items are consolidated more cleanly from timesheets.
landing.feature3Description: Move faster from time recording to an invoice ready to be validated and sent.
landing.automationTitle: From timesheet to invoice, without unnecessary friction
landing.automationDescription: Once hours are entered, SAFE structures the information to accelerate invoice preparation. The firm gains execution speed while reducing oversights and human errors.
landing.automationBullet3: The firm invoices faster and tracks performance better
landing.howItWorksTitle: Go from firm creation to billing in a few steps
landing.howItWorksDescription: SAFE guides you from initial setup to firm performance tracking, without unnecessary complexity.
landing.step1Description: Add the firm name, set up your main account and open your SAFE workspace.
landing.step2Description: Centralize legal matters, client contacts and essential information.
landing.step3Description: Track billable hours by matter, by lawyer and by activity.
landing.step4Description: Generate your invoices and track the firm's financial health in a single dashboard.
landing.trustTitle: Trust a system that transforms your timesheets into faster execution
landing.heroImageAlt: Premium preview of SAFE showing automatic invoice generation from timesheets
landing.automationImageAlt: Diagram showing the conversion of a timesheet into an invoice automatically in SAFE
landing.footerTagline: Automated billing and operations system for law firms.

auth.systemDescription: Create your firm, invite your employees and connect each team member with the firm name, their email and password.
auth.employeeNote: Employees sign in with the exact firm name, their email and password.
auth.firmCreated: Firm created. You can now sign in.
auth.firmCreatedFull: Firm created. Sign in with the firm name, your email and password.
auth.invalidCredentials: Firm name, email or password is incorrect.

onboarding.addClientDesc: Create a client profile with contact details and information.
onboarding.createMatterDesc: Open a new legal matter and associate a client.
onboarding.timeDescription: Record your hours by matter and by rate in a few clicks.
onboarding.enterTimeDesc: Create a timesheet linked to a matter and a rate.
onboarding.footerText: SAFE — Legal accounting for law firms

parametres.title: Settings
parametres.description: Firm configuration center: compliance, team, billing and critical operations.
parametres.governanceDesc: Foundational settings for your firm identity, internal organization and responsibilities.
parametres.govIdentityMissing: Add the firm address and details to ensure reliable correspondence and invoices.
parametres.govEmployeesCount: {employees} active employee(s) and {users} application access to monitor.
parametres.govCanManage: You can centralize operating preferences, roles and internal standards here.
parametres.govRestricted: Sensitive settings are managed by the firm administrator.
parametres.billingTaxesDesc: Essential elements to secure invoice production and firm profitability.
parametres.billingConfigMissing: Set the currency, invoice format and interest rules to standardize your billing.
parametres.billingOverdueCount: {count} invoice(s) require follow-up or a reminder.
parametres.billingKeepVisible: Keep visible in settings: taxes, payment terms, numbering and reminders.
parametres.complianceAuditDesc: Essential building blocks for Law 25, traceability and client data protection.
parametres.complianceRetentionConfigured: {count} retention policy(ies) configured by document type.
parametres.complianceAuditRestricted: Audit history is available based on your role permissions.
parametres.complianceEssentials: Essential settings here: retention, consent, logging and access management.
parametres.automationDesc: Settings that save time daily on imports, templates and processing rules.
parametres.automationRulesCount: {count} active categorization rule(s) to accelerate the expense journal.
parametres.automationTrustCount: {count} trust account(s) to monitor from financial settings.
parametres.automationNotifications: Plan notification preferences, document templates and internal automations here.
parametres.checklistTitle: Essential elements of a settings page
parametres.checkIdentityDesc: Name, address, billing contact and information displayed on official documents.
parametres.checkSecurityDesc: Roles, permissions, access review and team governance for employees and collaborators.
parametres.checkBillingDesc: Currency, interest rate, invoice format, reminders and client payment terms.
parametres.checkRetentionDesc: Retention policies, action traceability, consents and Law 25 compliance.
parametres.checkNotificationsDesc: Reminders, imports, categorization rules and document templates to streamline operations.
parametres.whatIAddedSub: A more business-oriented and management-focused view.
parametres.whatIAddedDesc: The page now highlights compliance, team management, billing, imports and useful automations for a firm.
parametres.nextStepsSub: Dedicated forms for each settings category.
parametres.nextStepsDesc: The added blocks already serve as a management center. Detailed configuration screens can be connected later.
parametres.nextImprovementSub: Add real editable settings from this page.
parametres.nextImprovementDesc: First candidates are invoice preferences, internal notifications and firm information.
parametres.teamAndRolesDesc: Making who manages what visible prevents errors on matters, access and approvals.
parametres.financesAndTrustDesc: Good settings should cover billing, trust accounts and payment rules.
parametres.complianceAndRisksDesc: Retention policies, audit and access are non-negotiable elements for your practice.
parametres.auditDescription: Audit logs for Law 25 and Bar compliance.
